description: E2E Test Screenshots - Real application UI captured with Playwright

screenshots.name: oauth-login-view
screenshots.description: LoginView renders with Google sign-in button

screenshots.name: oauth-authenticated
screenshots.description: User authenticated via Google, App renders with patient data

screenshots.name: admin-modal
screenshots.description: Admin panel opens password modal on click

screenshots.name: data-scan-interface
screenshots.description: Scan photo button for AI extraction

screenshots.name: data-manual-entry-modal
screenshots.description: Manual entry modal for adding readings

screenshots.name: dashboard-stats-overview
screenshots.description: Stats cards showing Average Fasting, Post-Meal, Total Readings

screenshots.name: dashboard-agp-graph
screenshots.description: Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) with trend chart

screenshots.name: dashboard-help-guide
screenshots.description: Help modal with comprehensive user guide

screenshots.name: dashboard-export-import
screenshots.description: Export and Import buttons for data management

notes: Screenshots captured using Playwright. Run: pnpm run test:e2e:screenshots (requires working dev server on port 3000)
implementation: Real screenshots are the standard. RealScreenshot.tsx loads actual PNG images from public/screenshots/e2e/ instead of drawing mockups.
